1. Scope

1.1. This End User License Agreement (“EULA”) governs your use of Sushi Ben (the “Game”), provided by Big Brane Studios, Inc. (“Big Brane,” “we,” “us,” or “our”).

1.2. By purchasing, downloading, installing, accessing, or using the Game, you agree to this EULA. If you do not agree, do not use the Game. We may update this EULA from time to time, and continued use of the Game after such updates constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

1.3. To agree to this EULA, you must (a) be at least 18 years old or have consent from a parent or legal guardian, and (b) have the legal capacity to enter into a binding agreement.

2. Store Terms

2.1. The Game may be offered through third-party platforms including, but not limited to, Steam, PlayStation, HTC, and Meta Quest (each, a “Store”).

2.2. Your use of the Game through a Store may be subject to that Store’s terms and conditions.

2.3. In the event of a conflict between this EULA and a Store’s terms, the Store’s terms shall prevail to the extent of the conflict.

2.4. All purchase-related inquiries, including refunds, must be directed to the Store through which the Game was purchased.

3. Privacy and Personal Information

Your use of the Game may involve the collection and use of personal information. Please review our Privacy & Data Collection Policy available at:
https://www.sushiben.com/privacy

4. Health and Safety Information

4.1. Review this section before using the Game. It is not exhaustive.

4.2. Epileptic Seizure Warning.
Certain individuals may experience seizures or loss of consciousness when exposed to flashing lights or patterns. If you or a family member has a history of epilepsy, consult a physician before use.

Stop using the Game immediately and consult a physician if you experience:
- Convulsions
- Eye or muscle twitching
- Loss of awareness
- Altered vision
- Involuntary movements
- Disorientation

4.3. Motion Sickness.
Virtual reality use may cause dizziness or nausea. Stop use and rest if symptoms occur.

4.4. Repetitive Motion Injuries and Eyestrain.
Take regular breaks and stop use if discomfort occurs.

4.5. Play Area Precautions.
Ensure your play area is clear of hazards. Do not use the Game near obstacles, sharp objects, or in unsafe conditions.

4.6. Additional warnings may be provided by platform providers.

5. Intellectual Property

All rights, title, and interest in and to the Game and its content are owned by Big Brane or its licensors and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws.

6. Fan Content

6.1. “Fan Content” means content created by users based on the Game.

6.2. Fan Content must comply with this EULA and our Fan Content Policy available at:
http://www.sushiben.com/fan-content

6.3. Big Brane may revoke permission for Fan Content at any time.

7. License Grant and Restrictions

7.1. Subject to this EULA, Big Brane grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use one (1) copy of the Game for personal, non-commercial use.

7.2. You may:

7.3. You may not:

- Reverse engineer, decompile, or attempt to extract source code except as permitted by law

7.4. This license does not transfer ownership. All rights remain with Big Brane and its licensors.

8.1. We may provide updates that are required to continue using the Game.

8.2. We may modify or withdraw the Game at any time without notice.

8.3. We are not obligated to support prior versions of the Game.

9. Warranties and Disclaimers

9.1. To the fullest extent permitted by law, the Game is provided “as is” and “as available,” without warranties of any kind.

9.2. We do not guarantee that the Game will be uninterrupted, error-free, or meet your expectations.

10. Limitation of Liability

10.1. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Big Brane and its affiliates shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, special, or punitive damages.

10.2. Big Brane shall not be liable for damages resulting from misuse, negligence, or unauthorized modifications of the Game.

10.3. In no event shall Big Brane’s total liability exceed the amount actually paid by you to Big Brane or an authorized distributor for the Game.

10.4. Nothing in this EULA limits rights that cannot be excluded under applicable law.

11. Indemnification

You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless Big Brane and its affiliates from any claims arising out of your breach of this EULA or misuse of the Game.

12. Termination

12.1. This EULA remains in effect until terminated.

12.2. We may terminate this EULA if you breach its terms.

12.3. Upon termination, you must stop using the Game and delete all copies.

13. Governing Law and Jurisdiction

13.1. This EULA is governed by the laws of the Commonwealth of Virginia, United States, excluding its conflict of laws rules.

13.2. Any legal action shall be brought exclusively in the state or federal courts located in Loudoun County, Virginia, United States.

13.3. You consent to the jurisdiction and venue of such courts and waive objections.
